author: m1--f2
content: Plan: (1) Add resolve_main_repo_root() to sync.rs and update SyncManager::new() to detect worktree context and use main repo's hub cache. (2) Add tests for worktree detection. (3) Fix kickoff.md allowed-tools: add Write, Read, Bash(echo *), remove Bash(claude *). (4) Fix featree.md allowed-tools: add Bash(echo *), Bash(crosslink *). Replace step 4 with crosslink init flow.
